title: Congress MLA Rajendra Bharti disqualified from MP Assembly after conviction in cheating case
content: Following deliberations on the issue on Thursday (April 2) night, the Vidhan Sabha authorities issued a notification annulling Mr. Bharti’s membership from the Datia Assembly seat

title: Kerala Assembly election 2026: Opposing fronts offer to hike welfare pension, enhanced health insurance coverage, metro rail
content: Both fronts release manifestos for Kerala polls on same day; UDF ‘guarantees’ include free bus travel for women, welfare pension hike to ₹3,000 per month, and ₹25 lakh health insurance; LDF backs limitless health cover and pension hike; both promise Metro projects for Thiruvananthapuram, Kozhikode

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026 | Interviews with key candidates and political leaders
content: A collection of interviews by ‘The Hindu’ with key candidates and political leaders as part of Kerala Assembly elections 2026 coverage

title: Maharashtra doctor’s death: Accused suspended policeman Gopal Badane granted bail
content: Gopal Badane filed bail application with court arguing that he was falsely implicated in the alleged crime and he had met the victim in the course of his duty

title: Kerala Assembly elections 2026 | Constituency watch
content: A collection of stories on some of the key constituencies in Kerala that are set to elect their representatives to Kerala Legislative Assembly in 2026

title: Kerala Assembly polls: Three-way contest sharpens in Vattiyurkavu amid high-decibel campaigning
content: While LDF candidate V.K. Prasanth seeks continuity highlighting the development projects he had undertaken, UDF’s K. Muraleedharan, a former MLA from the segment, says he has been a constant presence in the constituency. NDA's R. Sreelekha says the front will surpass expectations, pointing to "the encouraging response on the ground"

title: Attempt to encroach police land in Bengaluru by woman-led gang
content: A woman and her five associates tried to get hold of property that is estimated to be worth around ₹80 crore

title: Bengaluru-Ooty highway: Traffic diverted from old bridge to new bridge across Kabini river on Mysuru-Nanjangud stretch of NH 766
content: National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) sought the diversion of all vehicular traffic from the old bridge to the newly constructed bridge citing the need for repair and reconstruction of the old bridge, which is in a deteriorated condition

title: Where waste accumulates and river Adyar ‘weeps’
content: Two Chennai residents find themselves carrying out a cleanliness audit of a 400-metre riverside in Gandhinagar, Adyar. A WRD official notes that the waste on this river trail could be the result of back flow

title: GBA officials arrested for taking bribe for khata-related work in Bengaluru
content: The accused demanded a bribe of ₹3 lakh to clear the pending khata work related to the complainant’s building, the officials said

title: GBA proposes to increase permissible deviation limit in building construction in Bengaluru from 5% to 15%
content: The corporations have also proposed to impose a penalty for the regularisation of the deviation within permissible limits as a percentage of guidance value of the plot, indicating it is also a revenue-mopping exercise

title: Flutter over grading third language in Karnataka
content: Grading the third-language paper and not counting it towards the total marks in SSLC in Karnataka is being seen as the first step towards a two-language policy, writes Jayanth R.

title: Petroleum Secretary met State Chief Secretaries, addressed concerns about LPG for autos, migrant workers
content: The Petroleum Secretary sought states consider targeted distribution of 5 KG FTL cylinder, autos that can run both on petrol, LPG considering using the former.

title: From selfies to slogan: how Instagram is becoming India’s newest political battleground
content: In the run-up to Assembly elections this month, social media is flooded with viral memes and AI-generated disinformation, and it is reshaping political speech, influence and visibility online

title: Assembly Election highlights: ECI appoints Sandeep Rai Rathore to head Tamil Nadu police
content: The ECI also appointed Additional Director General of Police Sanjay Kumar, a 1997-batch IPS officer, as the Commissioner of Police, Tambaram and Abhishek Dixit as the Commissioner of Police, Madurai

title: 90-year-old woman alleges land-grab under LPS, seeks Jagan’s help
content: Nelluri Seshagiriamma claims that her land has been taken under the pretext of land pooling, and that she has neither been fairly compensated nor provided with the promised benefits

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: The social engineering behind Kerala’s electoral battle
content: Parties in the State are once again redrawing invisible lines, competing to secure the trust of communities and set the direction of social change

title: Punjab Congress leader Khushbaz Jattana dies in road accident in Haryana's Sonipat
content: In the incident, Jattana and his driver Parminder Singh died, while his gunman sustained injuries, Assistant Commissioner of Police (Rai), Sonipat, Vipin Ahlawat said

title: NGT dismisses application challenging Musi River Front Project
content: The Additional Advocate General T. Rajanikanth Reddy, appearing for Telangana government, informed the bench that already the government applied for environmental clearance for the project

title: Drowning in monsoon, dreaming of growth: recurring monsoon flooding in Warangal
content: Warangal’s double reality is hard to miss. Recurring monsoon flooding continues to expose civic deficiencies even as a wave of big-ticket projects signals a push for growth. A 24-storey multi super-specialty hospital, the Kakatiya Mega Textile Park, Railway Manufacturing Unit, Mamnoor Airport and a newly sanctioned underground drainage system together reflect an infrastructure- and industry-led transformation under way in this key north Telangana city, reports P. Laxma Reddy

title: Drizzle in some parts of Mumbai; may have been caused by western disturbance, says IMD official
content: None of the observatories in the city recorded any rainfall activity, India Meteorological Department scientist Sushma Nair said

title: Parliament passes Jan Vishwas Amendment Bill
content: Out of 784, 717 provisions are being amended for decriminalising minor offences and 67 to facilitate ease of living

title: Hema Malini writes to Speaker; says West Bengal denying permission for cultural events
content: “I have written a letter to the Honourable Speaker, highlighting a cultural fascism in West Bengal and how it is adversely affecting several people from the cultural world,” the Mathura MP said in a post on X

title: Education Ministry notifies NCERT as deemed university
content: The notification dated March 30 enables the NCERT to offer courses and confer degrees; it says all such academic programmes must conform to UGC norms and standards

title: BJP alleges ‘lawlessness’ in West Bengal over Malda incident, calls for Mamata’s resignation
content: Party spokesperson Gaurav Bhatia said ‘jungle raj’ was prevailing in the State under Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee

title: Government confirms extra sittings to debate amendments to Women’s Reservation Act 2023
content: Congress accuses government of maintaining unnecessary secrecy and alleges that the amendments are being brought in the middle of the election campaign eyeing possible electoral benefits

title: West Asia crisis impact: Manufacturing PMI drops sharply to near 4-year low of 53.9 in March 2026
content: The HSBC India Manufacturing Index noted that the new orders and output for manufacturing firms rose at their slowest rates since mid-2022

title: Rajasthan HC issues contempt notices over delay in panchayat, local body elections
content: The High Court had on November 14, 2025 directed the State government to hold these polls by April 15

title: Several minority scholarship schemes discontinued after 2021-22, Minority Affairs Minister tells Rajya Sabha
content: Mr. Brittas has also asked about the total scholarship amount allocated and actually given each year over the last five years, State-wise along with the details of the scholarship schemes for minorities which were stopped or merged in the last five years

title: Telangana food safety inspections uncover hygiene violations, 146 kg unsafe meat seized
content: According to officials, a total of 68 inspections were carried out under the State-wide meat drive. During these checks, 33 samples were collected for analysis and 56 notices were issued to food business operators for various violations

title: Omar Abdullah demands probe into Ganderbal encounter, after family claims ‘slain had no militant links’
content: “I believe the claim of the family should not be dismissed out of hand. At the very least this encounter needs a transparent and time bound probe with the facts made public. Any attempt to obfuscate or delay the announcement of a probe will only damage credibility & that is not in anyone’s interest,” says Mr. Abdullah

title: Congress delegation meets Maha Chief Electoral Officer, demands impartial SIR
content: “The complaints that voters belonging to specific castes and religions were deliberately excluded, large-scale irregularities have been reported in SIR drives that might have benefited the ruling party,” said State Congress president Harshwardhan Sapkal

title: U.P. Government committed to ensuring every eligible and needy person receives benefits of welfare schemes, says CM Adityanath
content: “The government is committed to ensuring that every eligible and needy person receives the benefits of welfare schemes and every issue is resolved effectively,” says CM Adityanath

title: M.P. HC to begin regular hearing of Bhojshala-Kamal Maula mosque dispute case from April 6
content: The development comes a day after the Supreme Court refused to intervene in the matter on a petition from the Muslim side while directing the High Court to consider the objections of all parties on the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI)’s report of a scientific survey of the site

title: The putrid mix of money and medical malpractice
content: A woman’s visit to a health centre in February over money she was allegedly owed for repeated egg harvesting has led the Maharashtra police to a network of illegal medical businesses operating across at least three States. Seven persons have been arrested and investigators have seized forged documents and hormonal injections from an accused’s residence, finds Chinmay Gaikwad

title: Kumkis help tackle a jumbo task in Chittoor
content: The saga of wild elephants raiding crops along forest fringes had been a frequent news story. Conventional responses—firecrackers, drums, or vehicles—soon proved ineffective. Then came the Forest Department’s Kumki initiative, which began playing a vital role in guiding wild herds back. Their camp life— bond with mahouts and kavadis, daily routines, strength, and care—captures the essence of this initiative, explores K. Umashanker

title: Akin to 2024 bypoll, DMK and PMK are set to lock horns yet again in Vikravandi constituency
content: The constituency consists of Vanniyars, Dalits, religious minorities and caste equations, like in other constituencies in Villupuram district, play a significant role in the final outcome here. Though the constituency has a strong presence of Vanniyars, the PMK has never won from here

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: party manifestos
content: This is a compilation of poll manifestos released by prominent political parties in Tamil Nadu ahead of the State Assembly election scheduled to be held on April 23, 2026

title: Trump ‘controlling’ Modi, claims Rahul Gandhi in Assam election rally
content: Mr. Modi handed energy security over to the U.S. to an extent that India cannot buy oil from Russia, Iran, and Iraq without seeking Mr. Trump’s permission, alleges Congress leader; he calls BJP leader Himanta Biswa Sarma the most corrupt Chief Minister of the country

title: On the campaign trail with K.C. Venugopal: When campaign gathers national and global vibes on north Kerala coast
content: From his base in Kerala, K.C. Venugopal directs Parliament strategy in Delhi, connects local fishermen’s concerns to developments in the Strait of Hormuz, and urges voters to unseat Pinarayi Vijayan and choose the Congress as the “real Left” in the State

title: Uttarakhand Police honoured with the President's Police Colours
content: The Chief Minister said the honour places the Uttarakhand Police in the league of select police forces of the country that have received this recognition

title: BJP planning to impose President’s Rule: Mamata
content: Seven judicial officers were gheraoed by locals at a BDO office at Mothabari in the State’s Malda District on April 1; the officials were rescued later by a huge contingent of police and security forces

title: Bullet Train progress: Tunnelling work completed for five-km tunnel
content: The 5-km tunnel, which passes between Ghansoli and Shilphata, is part of the 508-km-long MAHSR, connecting Gujarat, Maharashtra and the Union Territory of Dadra & Nagar Haveli

title: T.N. Assembly election: Egmore constituency residents weigh infrastructure upgrades against many long-standing civic problems
content: As Metro Rail work is ongoing in Purasawalkam, traffic congestion and disrupted MTC bus services to some pockets remain core issues; travelling on arterial stretches of Demellows Road - Sydenhams Road and Choolai High Road is a harrowing experience for motorists due to sewer work

title: Watch: What’s at stake in the Tamil Nadu elections 2026?
content: Tamil Nadu’s 2026 Assembly election is shaping up to be more than a familiar DMK vs AIADMK contest. But new entrants are complicating the picture. Here’s all you need to know.

title: Tamil Nadu’s actor-politicians and their crusade against corruption
content: Actor and TVK founder C. Joseph Vijay’s anti-corruption plank is nothing new as the film stars floating their own parties in Tamil Nadu have taken up this theme to earn a name for themselves and garner a massive vote

title: M.P. Congress MLA, another man sentenced to three years in jail for fraud
content: Datia MLA Rajendra Bharti to challenge the verdict in Delhi High Court; while the MLA has been fined ₹1 lakh, a former bank employee convicted for helping him fined ₹2.5 lakh

title: Tiger told deputy: 'Was just talking to president'
content: After crashing his SUV last week in Florida, Tiger Woods took out his phone and told a deputy, "I was just talking to the president," according to body camera footage released Thursday showing the golfer's arrest on a DUI charge.

title: Source: Luka (hamstring) set for MRI after exit
content: Lakers star Luka Doncic exited Thursday's loss to the Thunder early because of a strained left hamstring.

title: Sources: KU's Bidunga to test draft, enter portal
content: Flory Bidunga, who projects as a second-round pick, would be the top player in the portal among the more than 800 players so far who intend to enter.

title: Phil to miss Masters due to family health matter
content: Phil Mickelson announced Thursday that he won't play in next week's Masters and will be out for an extended period as his family continues to "navigate a personal health matter."

title: Judge denies UVA QB Morris' request for 7th year
content: A Virginia circuit court judge denied Virginia quarterback Chandler Morris' request for a preliminary injunction to play a seventh season on Thursday.

title: Not a multitasker: Lloyd focused on Zona, not UNC
content: Arizona head coach Tommy Lloyd said he's not a "multitasker" amid rumors tying him to the North Carolina opening as his team prepares to play Michigan in the Final Four on Saturday.

title: Royals' Jensen oversleeps, scratched from lineup
content: Catcher Carter Jensen was removed from the Royals' starting lineup for Thursday's game against the Twins after he overslept.

title: 🍼 Allen, Steinfeld announce birth of first child
content: The Buffalo Bills quarterback and the "Sinners" actress did not share the date of birth or the name of their daughter.

title: Three-round NFL mock draft: Kiper, Miller, Reid and Yates rotate through the top 100 picks
content: We asked four draft analysts -- Mel Kiper Jr., Matt Miller, Jordan Reid and Field Yates -- to make picks in the first three rounds. Where do the top prospects land?

title: These flaws could hold back the draft's top QBs
content: We saw a lot during the college careers of the draft's top QBs. Each has something that could set them back.

title: The latest on Kawhi Leonard, Steve Ballmer and the NBA's investigation into the LA Clippers
content: What was actually in Leonard's contract? What do league insiders think of it? Here's what we know about the allegations -- and where the investigation stands.

title: Scouts debate the top of the NBA draft class: Peterson or Dybantsa at No. 1?
content: Fit over talent? Versatility over production? NBA scouts and execs break down the conversations happening at the top of the draft.

title: How Brandon Bussi's brother, Dylan, continues to inspire his NHL journey
content: The 27-year-old goalie has had a record-breaking debut season for the Hurricanes, and his brother remains in his mindset.

title: Your men's Final Four guide: Illinois-UConn, Arizona-Michigan (with predictions!)
content: We run through every team's keys to advancing to the championship game -- and their potential fatal flaws.

title: Chasing history, Arizona is staying present in run to Final Four
content: The Wildcats are back in the national semifinals for the first time in 25 years -- but are focused on the moment.

title: MLB Power Rankings: Who are the top teams one week into the season?
content: With baseball now underway, how much has changed since our preseason rankings? Our Week 1 rankings tell the story.

title: 'Nobody would've believed it if there wasn't a video': Remembering Randy Johnson's bird pitch
content: In 2001, one of baseball's first viral moments played out on a spring training field. Those who were there relive the "Sea of Feathers" game.

title: Ranking the top 55 WNBA free agents, from MVPs to key rotation players
content: More than 100 players are WNBA free agents. We break down what factors are at play in the decision-making process.

title: No seats, no silence: A night inside the Clippers' Wall
content: Built to disrupt, the Intuit Dome's most intense section affects games in real time by turning fans into participants -- and opponents into targets.

title: USMNT big board: Did March losses finalize Pochettino's squad?
content: The March international window was the last time for players to impress U.S. coach Mauricio Pochettino, so who cemented their place on his team?

title: Kit ranking: Assessing every jersey we'll see this summer
content: The World Cup will be the first with 48 teams, which means 96 kits! Here is every one, from worst to first.

title: Who are the best 21 women's players aged 21 or under in the world?
content: Welcome to the next generation of women's stars aged 21 or under, with representatives from the NWSL, WSL and across Europe.

title: Inside the friction between Jalen Hurts and the Eagles
content: ESPN pulls back the curtain on what's ailing a star-studded Eagles offense, one in which its QB must evolve.

title: 'Let her play': Chiefs launch petition for high school girls' flag football in Kansas
content: The Kansas State High School Activities Association will have a vote on April 23 to determine if girls' high school flag football will be sanctioned.

title: Tournament picks: How to bet Saturday's national semifinal games
content: Will the Illini get revenge for the loss to UConn back in November? Is the total too high in the late game?

title: Alvarez a top-10 bat? Ohtani wins Cy Young? Perdomo for real? Don't be surprised
content: Eric Karabell looks into the crystal ball to tell fantasy baseball managers what might come to pass in the not-too-distant future.

title: The new aces? Five pitchers poised for a breakout season
content: Tristan H. Cockcroft takes a look at five pitchers who are likely to be on many a fantasy championship roster.

title: Why new rules have Max Verstappen on the brink of walking away from F1
content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: ‘They’ll stop when I stop’: Trump says Israel will halt Iran strikes at his call
content: President Trump asserted that Israel would follow his lead in ending the Iran war, stating they would stop military action when he decides. This comes after a Trump-directed operation, Operation Epic Fury, led to the elimination of Iran's supreme leader. Despite Netanyahu's push for a sustained offensive, Trump acknowledged Iran's resilience and sought an off-ramp amid declining domestic support.

title: Andhra triple murder: Man kills pregnant wife, 2 daughters; bodies found in pool
content: A woman and her two young daughters were discovered dead in a swimming pool on the outskirts of Punnole village. The woman's father alleges her husband murdered them, suspecting the unborn child was also a girl and citing a history of harassment. Police are investigating and searching for the accused.

title: SRH run riot, but Abhishek Sharma lands in trouble after IPL code breach
content: Despite Sunrisers Hyderabad's dominant 65-run victory over Kolkata Knight Riders, all-rounder Abhishek Sharma was fined 25% of his match fees and received one demerit point for breaching the IPL Code of Conduct. Sharma admitted to the Level 1 offense, which occurred during SRH's explosive 82-run opening stand.

title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai to 'return' to Stanford University in June 2026
content: Google and Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai will deliver Stanford University's 2026 Commencement address. A Stanford alumnus, Pichai expressed his privilege to address the graduating class. This marks his first in-person commencement speech, following a virtual address to the Class of 2020 during the pandemic, where he encouraged resilience and embracing change.

title: First time since 1972, humans leave Earth orbit and head for the Moon; what comes next?
content: Humans have once again ventured beyond Earth's orbit as NASA's Artemis II mission successfully propelled its crew towards the Moon. This historic flight, the first since 1972, carries a diverse crew on a lunar flyby, marking a significant step in humanity's return to deep space exploration and paving the way for future lunar missions.

title: ‘I request you with folded hands’: Ashwin’s emotional plea to Rishabh Pant
content: Ravichandran Ashwin has appealed to Rishabh Pant to open the batting for Lucknow Super Giants in every match of IPL 2026. Pant's batting position has been a key discussion point. Ashwin believes opening will benefit Pant and the team. Pant himself stated his role is still uncertain but he will bat in the top order.

title: Iran claims IRGC Navy struck Oracle facility in Dubai, escalating tech-targeted attacks
content: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claims it struck an Oracle data center in Dubai, following threats against US tech firms. This follows a reported attack on an Amazon cloud center in Bahrain. The IRGC warned employees of 18 US companies, including Microsoft and Google, to evacuate facilities, citing retaliation for attacks in Iran.

title: ‘Dhurandhar 2' BO Day 15: Ranveer starrer inches close to Rs 1,500cr worldwide
content: Ranveer Singh's spy thriller 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has crossed Rs 1490 crore worldwide by the end of its second week. The film is now poised to surpass Rs 1500 crore globally as it enters its third week. Domestically, the net collection is nearing Rs 950 crore, with gross business aiming for Rs 1130 crore.

title: Kerala polls: Telangana CM unveils UDF manifesto, calls it the beginning of a 'golden era'
content: Telangana CM Revanth Reddy launched the UDF manifesto in Kochi, declaring an end to Kerala's 'dark era' and the dawn of a 'golden era.' He criticized the Pinarayi Vijayan government, alleging corruption and insecurity of religious assets. The manifesto includes 'Indira's Five Guarantees' and five 'Dream Projects,' promising significant welfare and development initiatives for the state.

title: LPG rumours: Centre urges states to prevent panic buying after only 17 conduct briefings
content: The Centre is urging states to boost communication efforts against LPG supply rumors, as inadequate public outreach fuels panic buying. Only 17 states currently hold press briefings. Authorities are asked to intensify proactive, regular communication via press conferences and social media to reassure citizens about LPG availability and distribution, while also curbing hoarding and black marketing.

title: All about KL Rahul and Athiya Shetty’s home in Mumbai and Bangalore
content: Dynamic duo KL Rahul and Athiya Shetty have masterfully designed chic residences in both Mumbai and Bangalore. Their Mumbai apartment features sleek, contemporary décor with breathtaking city vistas, while their Bangalore home reflects an opulent yet understated style brimming with lush greenery.

title: 'Agenda against me, they’re jealous’: Rahane's no-holds-barred swipe at critics
content: Ajinkya Rahane fiercely defended his batting and leadership after Kolkata Knight Riders' heavy defeat to Sunrisers Hyderabad. He dismissed critics questioning his strike rate, claiming they have agendas and are jealous of his success. Despite KKR's collapse, Rahane insisted his intent was clear and backed his approach, remaining defiant amidst mounting pressure.

title: 'His wife harassed me': Karnataka doctor dies by suicide over affair rumours with professor
content: A 23-year-old Ayurvedic doctor, Dr. MU Nikitha, allegedly died by suicide in Chitradurga district after facing harassment. A death note indicated she was distressed by rumors of an illicit relationship with a lecturer, spread by college students and the lecturer's wife. Police have registered a case against the lecturer, his wife, and some students.

title: From AAP’s polished young face to Punjab fadeout: Raghav Chadha’s diminishing clout
content: Raghav Chadha's diminished role in AAP, marked by his replacement as Rajya Sabha deputy leader and removal from speaking time allocation, signals a significant decline in his political clout, especially in Punjab. Once a key strategist, his prolonged absences and perceived overreach have led to a formal downsizing of his influence within the party.

title: Will Brand Pinarayi survive Kerala’s electoral cycle?
content: Kerala's 2026 assembly elections will test Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan's governance model against mounting voter unease, fiscal stress, and internal CPM rifts.  The LDF faces challenges from anti-incumbency, economic strain, and perception gaps, while Vijayan aims to counter this with a narrative of development and strong leadership.

title: Punjab Congress leader Khushbaz Singh Jatana, driver killed as truck slams Defender
content: Punjab Congress leader Khushbaz Singh Jatana and his driver were killed in a tragic accident on the KMP Expressway near Sonipat. A speeding truck rammed into their stationary SUV after it developed a tyre puncture. Jatana's gunman was critically injured in the incident.

title: Over 1,000 fall ill as sewage mixes with drinking water in Jaipur
content: Ward 45 in Sushilpura faces a health crisis as sewage contaminates drinking water, sickening over 1,000 residents, particularly children and the elderly. Damaged sewer lines during road work are blamed. Residents report severe stomach issues and fever, with many struggling to access clean water. Officials have promised repairs and water tankers, but relief remains elusive for many.

title: Martina Navratilova warns Emma Raducanu after Miami Open withdrawal
content: Emma Raducanu’s coaching changes are back in focus after Martina Navratilova urged her to stay with one coach longer. Raducanu, however, prefers flexibility and wants to rediscover her natural game. With mixed results, recent injuries, and no full-time coach, she stands at a key moment. Her next decision could define how her career moves forward.

title: Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry team up with $150bn mogul
content: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.

title: Stephen Curry opens up on struggles as Ayesha Curry faces criticism
content: ​Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, is considered one of the most popular athletes in the world because of his talent. While Stephen Curry’s achievements have inspired billions of fans around the world, the Golden State Warriors’ star player remains committed to his career. Amid this, Stephen Curry opens up about what kept him going throughout the years through all the failures.

title: 'Went to London when Kejriwal was arrested': How Raghav Chadha's feud with AAP is being read
content: Raghav Chadha, a former key AAP figure, appears sidelined, fueling speculation with his absence from public events and silence on crucial party issues. His prolonged absence during Arvind Kejriwal's arrest and subsequent lack of comment on the excise case have intensified these questions. Punjab Congress president suggests Chadha is distancing himself from the party.

title: PSL crackdown! Fakhar Zaman’s appeal dismissed, ban confirmed
content: Pakistan Super League opener Fakhar Zaman's appeal against a two-match ban for ball tampering has been dismissed. The appellate body upheld the original decision, finding him guilty of breaching the code of conduct during a match against Karachi Kings.  This means Fakhar will miss crucial upcoming fixtures for the Lahore Qalandars.

title: Stock market holiday on Good Friday: Are NSE, BSE closed or open for trading today?
content: Stock markets will observe a closure on April 3rd for Good Friday, marking the beginning of several scheduled holidays for the remainder of 2026. Investors are advised to note these closures, which impact trading strategies and fund settlements. The article also outlines the daily trading hours, including pre-open, main trading, and closing sessions, alongside specific timings for block deals.

title: Trump slaps patented drugs with 100% tariff, lowers duties for metals
content: US President Trump has imposed steep 100% tariffs on imported patented medicines and new duties on steel, aluminium, and copper. This aims to compel companies to manufacture within the US, with exemptions for some nations. The move seeks to bolster domestic production and national security, building on previous trade actions.

title: ‘Make a deal before it’s too late’: Trump warns Iran as bridge strike toll rises to 8
content: In a bold address, President Trump cautioned Iran, calling for immediate negotiations following US airstrikes that struck a significant bridge just outside of Tehran and a prominent medical institution. Posting a video showcasing the damage to the Karaj bridge, Trump pledged to intensify measures. This development heightens regional instability, hinting at a more aggressive approach from the United States.

title: Kash Patel on bench after Bondi exit? Trump weighing departure of more key White House officials
content: White House planning reportedly indicates potential exits for key figures like FBI Director Kash Patel, Army Secretary Daniel Driscoll, and Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer. These discussions follow a recent wave of senior official removals, suggesting a broader administrative shake-up. The timing of any further changes remains uncertain as President Trump has not finalized decisions.

title: Pakistan fuel crisis deepens: Diesel up 55%, petrol rises 42% amid Hormuz disruption
content: Pakistan's recent surge in petrol and diesel prices, marking the second rise in just a few weeks, stems from the chaos of war in the Middle East that has shaken the stability of global oil markets. The government has described these increases as unavoidable to alleviate the mounting pressures of fuel subsidies on national finances.

title: IPL 2026: Abhishek Sharma scripts history, joins David Warner to....
content: Abhishek Sharma achieved a significant milestone for Sunrisers Hyderabad, becoming the second player to hit 100 sixes for the franchise. SRH secured their first IPL 2026 win by defeating Kolkata Knight Riders by 65 runs, defending a season-high total of 226/8 with a strong bowling performance.

title: Hyderabad techie dies by suicide over 'dowry harassment'
content: A 26-year-old software professional from Bihar allegedly died by suicide in Hyderabad, found by her husband. Police have taken the husband into custody, citing alleged mental harassment for dowry and pressure for investment in his startup. The couple, married in February after a five-year live-in relationship, reportedly faced marital discord.

title: No handshake row hits FIDE Candidates 2026 - Watch
content: Ukraine’s Anna Muzychuk defeated Russia’s Kateryna Lagno in Round 4 of the Women’s Candidates 2026, with no handshake or acknowledgement reflecting ongoing geopolitical tensions. Muzychuk’s precise play exploited Lagno’s critical error on move 28, winning in 31 moves. The victory puts Muzychuk atop the leaderboard with 2.5 points, tied with Bibisara Assaubayeva.

title: ‘Law & order breakdown’: SC slams gheraoing in Bengal
content: The Supreme Court expressed grave concern over an attack on judicial officers in West Bengal's Malda, citing a breakdown in law and order.  The apex court has issued show-cause notices to top state officials and ordered central forces for officer protection. A central agency will investigate the 'deliberate and calculated' attempt to obstruct justice.

title: Sanjay Gupta reacts to Ranbir Kapoor starrer 'Ramayana' makers claim about VFX
content: Filmmaker Sanjay Gupta critiqued the 'Ramayana' teaser, questioning the hype around its Oscar-winning VFX team, emphasizing that technicians, not companies, receive accolades.  His earlier 'Khoda pahaad… nikla chuha' comment also drew parallels to the teaser's mixed reception, with some viewers deeming the visuals disappointing. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Will MS Dhoni play today? Viral training clip excites fans ahead of CSK vs PBKS clash
content: MS Dhoni has been spotted training ahead of Chennai Super Kings' IPL 2026 clash against Punjab Kings, fueling hopes of an earlier-than-expected return from a calf strain. The veteran captain missed CSK's opening match defeat, but his presence at practice sessions has boosted fan optimism.

title: Bengaluru saw over 2,100 new vehicles a day on average; total count touches 1.2 crore
content: Bengaluru's vehicle count surpassed 1.2 crore by March 2026, with over 7.9 lakh new vehicles added in 2025-26, straining the city's infrastructure. This surge, driven by private vehicle dependence due to inadequate public transport, exacerbates congestion and poses public health risks. Experts urge a policy shift towards promoting public transport.

title: US Allies Work On Plan B For Hormuz Strait If Trump Walks Away
content: Trump has strongly criticised North Atlantic Treaty Organization countries for being unwilling to deploy their own militaries to the waterway -- going as far as to threaten leaving the alliance.

title: Pakistan Hikes Petrol Prices By 43%, Diesel Up By 55% Amid US-Iran War
content: The US-Israel war on Iran, launched on February 28, has plunged the Middle East into conflict, with Iranian retaliatory strikes hitting targets across the Gulf and virtually freezing shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Oracle Office In Dubai Hit In Iran Strikes? What UAE Said
content: The clarification came after Iranian media reported that the data centres of two US firms -- Oracle in Dubai and Amazon in Bahrain -- were targeted by the IRGC in a new wave of attacks on US firms on Thursday.

title: Any "Misadventure" From Pak Will Invite "Unprecedented" Action: Rajnath Singh
content: Rajnath Singh warns Pakistan of unprecedented action if terror attacks repeat after Pahalgam incident

title: Punjab Congress Leader Khushbaz Jattana Dies In Road Accident In Haryana
content: Punjab Congress leader Khushbaz Singh Jattana and his driver died in a road accident in Sonipat district.

title: Record 2.4 Lakh CAPF Personnel Deployed In Bengal Ahead Of Assembly Polls
content: Election Commission deploys 2.4 lakh CAPF personnel in West Bengal for highest-ever election security.

title: "We're Only Nation To Lose Mariners At Hormuz": India At Iran War Talks
content: So far, at least three Indian seafarers on board foreign-flagged vessels have been killed and one has been injured while their vessels were stranded in the Hormuz Strait

title: France Bans Planned Gathering Of Muslims In Paris, Citing Security Risk
content: France banned a gathering of Muslims that was planned in the Paris area for the coming days, due to it representing a security risk, the country's top police officer said on Thursday.

title: Artemis II Astronauts Rocket Toward The Moon After Spending A Day Around Earth
content: NASA's Artemis II astronauts fired their engines and blazed toward the moon Thursday night, breaking free of the chains that have trapped humanity in shallow laps around Earth in the decades since Apollo.

title: Ex-Nepal PM KP Sharma Oli Sent To 2-Day Police Remand In Gen-Z Protest Case
content: A court in Nepal has granted two-days remand to former Prime Minister KP Sharma Oli for the atrocities committed during the Gen-Z protest last September.

title: Trump Imposes 100% Tariffs On Foreign-Made Drugs, Reshapes Metal Duties
content: Large companies will have 120 days to commit to "reshoring plans" before the steep duty kicks in, while smaller companies have a 180-day buffer, a senior US official told reporters.

title: Trump's White House Ballroom Gets Final Approval Despite Court Order
content: The ballroom, now estimated to cost $400 million, has expanded in scope and price tag since Trump first announced the project last summer, citing a need for space other than a tent on the lawn to host important guests.

title: 5 Killed In Suicide Car Bomb Blast In Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
content: A suicide car bomb blast targeting a police station in northwest Pakistan's Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province killed five persons including three women and a child late Thursday, police said.

title: Pete Hegseth Asks US Army Chief Of Staff To Step Down
content: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has asked the Army's top uniformed officer, Gen. Randy George, to step down, the Pentagon said Thursday, as the United States wages a war against Iran.

title: Centre Clarifies Fuel Supply To Bangladesh Amid Energy Crisis
content: India on Thursday said that it has received a request from Bangladesh for the supply of diesel, which is currently being examined by the government.

title: Iran Targets Oracle Data Centre In Dubai: Report
content: Iran War: Quoting the Revolutionary Guards' navy command, Tasnim news agency also said the data centres of two US firms -- Oracle in Dubai and Amazon in Bahrain -- were targeted.

title: Haridwar Plans To Shift Meat Shops Outside City Ahead Of 2027 Ardh Kumbh
content: According to the Haridwar Municipal Corporation bylaws, the sale and consumption of meat, liquor and eggs are already prohibited within a five-kilometre radius of Har Ki Pauri.

title: ‘Grossly obscene’: Delhi HC orders takedown of ‘vulgar’ song by Yo Yo Honey Singh, Badshah
content: justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav observed that the song, reportedly dating back to 2006, was deeply offensive and had no artistic or social merit . the high court said the lyrics were demeaning towards women and promoted an unacceptable portrayal that reduced them to objects .

title: Betting odds for the Masters, future golf majors: Scheffler, McIlroy favored
content: Scottie Scheffler's odds to win the first major of the year, the Masters, stand at +405 a week ahead of his tee-off time . the top five are a who's who of past major winners, with Rory McIlroy , Jon Rahm , Bryson DeChambeau and Xander Schauffele most frequently occupying top five .

title: 'India remains only country to have lost mariners in attacks': MEA on Hormuz crisis
content: more than 60 countries participated in the meeting that discussed diplomatic and political measures to restore freedom of navigation through the key energy route . the government said he also stressed the impact of the crisis on India’s energy security and the fact that India remains the only country to have lost mariners in attacks on merchant shipping .

title: Rangers' ninth inning 'Rally Sombrero' leads 2026 new ballpark foods
content: the Texas Rangers are serving up a rally sombrero where fans can eat their head off . a nine-layer dip filled with toppings such as guacamole, cheese and black olives surrounds the middle . the Colorado Rockies will have donut pizzas at Coors Field this season .

title: Why Big Ten dominance might be here to stay
content: coach dusty May asked how recent rule changes in college athletics helped league teams have such success . this narrative ignores many past scandals in the league, let alone that the Big Ten has produced plenty of contenders through the years . the overall sentiment is somewhat fair, however, though .

title: Men's Final Four has a Carolina blue backdrop
content: it's been over a week since north Carolina fired coach Hubert Davis . there have been few updates on the north Carolina Tar Heels' coaching search . despite a dynamic men's final four in Indianapolis this weekend, UNC will be a primary topic of discussion .

title: Women's March Madness: The 15 best players left in the field
content: the final women's college basketball player rankings for 2025-26 are pared down to 15 as the tournament shifts to Phoenix for the national semifinals . Sarah Strong has been no. 1 since the preseason rankings . she is trying to replicate what former Huskies great Breanna Stewart did: win four national championships in four seasons .

title: Two-time All-Pro, 2019 DPOY Gilmore retiring
content: two-time All-Pro cornerback Stephon Gilmore announced his retirement on friday . the 35-year-old was selected a first-team All-pro in both 2018 and 2019 . he led the NFL with six interceptions and 20 passes defended .

title: Konnor Griffin is headed to the majors! What you need to know about Pirates' 19-year-old
content: the Pittsburgh Pirates are calling up the top prospect in the sport . the 19-year-old shortstop is expected to become MLB's first teenage position player since Juan Soto debuted in 2018 . he is the best prospect baseball has seen in years .

title: Preview and predictions: Which teams will win in the semifinals?
content: a year ago, the Huskies, Gamecocks, Longhorns and Bruins were the top four teams . for just the second time, the final four is a repeat of the previous year . this is also the fifth time that all four no. 1 seeds made it through the bracket .
